.file-embed.background: rgb(245, 246, 248) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(242, 243, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(92, 115, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(92, 115, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(242, 243, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(242, 243, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(242, 243, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(245, 246, 248) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(92, 214, 242, 0.59) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(245, 246, 248) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(245, 246, 248) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

th.background: rgb(92, 115, 242) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
